name: Seafile
short_description: Fast, reliable file syncing and sharing platform for self-hosted team collaboration.
description: Seafile is a self-hosted file sync and share platform with efficient storage, versioning, and user permissions. It supports desktop and mobile sync clients, team libraries, and built-in web previews while keeping all data private on your infrastructure.
usecases: Sync documents and media across devices via encrypted, efficient delta sync.
Share folders with teams using permissions and group management.
Host your own file collaboration server with audit logging and backup support.
notes: Change defaults for database and admin password after first login.
Use external storage volumes for large libraries.
